title: doellingeria umbellata subsp. humilis
intro: Doellingeria umbellata subsp. humilis, commonly known as wood aster or small wood aster, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers have been utilized in herbal preparations to address conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Wood aster has also been used to promote wound healing, reduce pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine.
